meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Solve Project Stagnation
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS build. Learn to use AI debugging tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to ship your MVP faster and overcome project roadblocks.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is 'debugging paralysis.' By integrating AI-driven agents like Antigravity and Claude Code into your local environment, you automate the diagnosis of technical blockers. This shifts your role from frustrated coder to architectural director, ensuring you maintain momentum and ship your MVP to market rapidly.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the initial spark of your SaaS idea has faded into a graveyard of half-baked repositories and unresolved console errors. You aren't failing because your idea lacks merit; you're failing because you're getting trapped in the weeds of syntax and dependency hell while your competitors are already collecting revenue.

It is time to stop playing developer and start acting like a CTO. By leveraging AI-native debugging workflows, you can treat your codebase as an evolving asset rather than a wall of resistance. This guide pulls back the curtain on how elite founders ship continuously, turning technical debt into an automated, solved problem.

steps.title: Establish the Architectural Context
steps.description: Before debugging, the AI must understand your business logic, not just the syntax. Define the core revenue-generating feature that is currently blocked.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current repository structure. Identify the primary function responsible for user conversion and explain why it is failing to execute as expected.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --init --context 'focus on user authentication and database persistence'

steps.title: Isolate the Bottleneck
steps.description: Use automated tracing to pinpoint exactly which line of code is leaking resources or throwing runtime exceptions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a trace on the current module. Identify the exact line causing the runtime error and suggest a refactor that prioritizes performance.

steps.title: Automated Remediation
steps.description: Apply a hotfix generated by the AI based on your specific architectural constraints, ensuring it doesn't break existing revenue flows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a patch for the identified bug. Ensure the solution maintains compatibility with my current API schema and includes unit tests.

steps.title: Validate Against Business Logic
steps.description: Don't just check if the code runs; check if it solves the user's problem. Simulate a conversion event.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a test script that simulates a user purchase flow. Verify that the fix handles edge cases like network latency or invalid inputs.

steps.title: Ship and Monitor
steps.description: Deploy the fix and monitor the telemetry to ensure the bottleneck is cleared and the feature is live.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the recent changes and generate a deployment summary. Identify any potential performance regressions to monitor post-deployment.

pro_tips: Always force the AI to provide a 'Business Impact' summary before applying any code patch to ensure you aren't optimizing for vanity metrics.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation for every fix; this prevents 'knowledge rot' when you eventually hire your first lead engineer.
Configure Antigravity to ignore non-essential UI files during debugging to reduce token consumption and focus exclusively on backend logic.
Treat your error logs as your product roadmap; the most frequent AI-detected errors are your highest-priority features to simplify or remove.
Run periodic 'AI Audit' sessions once a week to refactor code that was 'hacked together' during your initial MVP sprint.
content.next_steps: Once your first blocker is cleared, focus on automating your CI/CD pipeline using the same AI agents to ensure that future bugs are caught before they reach production.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap. The only thing left is to execute with relentless consistency. Stop letting technical debt dictate your growth. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
